mapper.select: SELECT r.id, r.name, (SELECT LISTAGG(p.name, ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY p.name) FROM permission_mapping pm JOIN permission p ON pm.perm_id = p.id WHERE pm.role_id = r.id ) AS perNames, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM role_mapping WHERE role_id = r.id) AS useCount FROM roles r WHERE id != 'ROLE0001' AND id != 'ROLE0003' ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT r.id, r.name, r.is_assignee, pm.perm_id FROM roles r LEFT OUTER JOIN permission_mapping pm ON r.id = pm.role_id WHERE r.id = #{id}

SELECT DISTINCT p.id, p.name FROM role_mapping rm JOIN project_member pmbr ON pmbr.id = rm.member_id JOIN permission_mapping pm ON rm.role_id = pm.role_id JOIN permission p ON pm.perm_id = p.id WHERE pmbr.user_id = #{userId} AND pmbr.project_id = #{projectId} AND pmbr.is_delete = 'F0' AND rm.is_delete = 'F0' ORDER BY p.id ASC

SELECT r.id, r.name FROM role_mapping rm JOIN roles r ON rm.role_id = r.id JOIN project_member pm ON pm.id = rm.member_id WHERE pm.user_id = #{userId} AND pm.project_id = #{projectId} AND pm.is_delete = 'F0' AND rm.is_delete = 'F0' ORDER BY r.id DESC
mapper.insert:
SELECT BEEZ.generate_pk_auto('roles') FROM dual
INSERT INTO roles ( id, name, is_assignee) VALUES ( #{id}, #{name}, #{isAssignee})
